response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive senior-level software development experience and a strong open-source background, he falls short on critical executive requirements for this Head of Development role. Crucially, his basic German proficiency does not meet the strict C1 minimum requirement necessary for client advising in this consulting role. Furthermore, his profile leans heavily toward an individual technical contributor (Staff/Senior Engineer) rather than demonstrating the required executive-level team management, formal IT consulting leadership, and UML enterprise architecture design.
strengths: Extensive senior and staff-level software engineering experience across a wide variety of modern tech stacks.
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux environments, and developing scalable platforms.
Proven track record of mentoring and knowledge sharing through workshops, Dojos, and conference talks.
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a 'Basic' level, failing the strict C1 minimum requirement.
Lacks proven executive-level leadership and formal team management experience required for a Head of Development.
Missing explicit experience in IT consulting client advisory, formal UML modeling, and IT risk management.
